case_title: CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT VS. ERNEST NOVELOZO

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUTHORIZED DELEGEE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS ADMINSTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT NOVELOZO, ERNEST AKA ERNESTO SERAFIN NOVELZO, AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA NOVELOZO AND SONS CONSTRUCTION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUTHORIZED DELEGEE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS ADMINSTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NOVELOZO, ERNEST AKA ERNESTO SERAFIN NOVELZO, AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA NOVELOZO AND SONS CONSTRUCTION $500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
